name: Athene Holding Ltd.
business: Athene is a financial services company specializing in issuing, reinsuring and acquiring retirement savings products, principally annuities and funding agreements, for individuals and institutions seeking to fund retirement needs.
sellsTo: Institutions including pension plans, stable value funds, and defined contribution plans
Insurance companies through flow and block reinsurance

exposures.sentence: We principally offer two product lines: annuities and funding agreements.

catalysts.event: Entered into a block reinsurance agreement with Sony Life Insurance Co., Ltd. to reinsure a block of whole life insurance policies.
catalysts.sentence: On October 1, 2025, we entered into an agreement with Sony Life Insurance Co., Ltd., pursuant to which we agreed to reinsure a small block of whole life insurance policies on a coinsurance basis.

catalysts.event: OECD issued guidance exempting US-parented groups from Pillar Two IIR/UTPR taxes, leading to a planned valuation allowance against Bermuda deferred tax assets in Q1 2026.
catalysts.sentence: On January 5, 2026, the OECD issued guidance exempting US-parented groups from the IIR or UTPR taxes under the Pillar Two regime.

catalysts.event: Announced a full valuation allowance against Bermuda deferred tax assets to be recorded in the first quarter of 2026.
catalysts.sentence: As a result of the foregoing, in the first quarter of 2026, we will record a full valuation allowance against our Bermuda deferred tax assets, as we no longer expect Athene or ACRA to incur Bermuda CIT or Pillar Two tax expense against which such deferred tax assets could be utilized.

catalysts.event: Launched first Guaranteed Investment Contract (GIC) to defined contribution stable value funds and began selling structured settlement annuities.
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we launched and issued our first Guaranteed Investment Contract (GIC) to defined contribution stable value funds and began selling structured settlement annuities.
